hero.title: Art on glass
hero.subtitle: Tempered safety glass · 4mm · mounting hooks included

about.label: About us
about.text: Glassart and Design creates artwork on 4mm tempered safety glass for hotels, restaurants, wellness centers, offices and private collections. Every piece is delivered complete with mounting hooks, ready to hang.

collectionsPage.title: Collections
collectionsPage.intro: Discover our artwork on glass, organized by application.
